chapter_title: Regul. of Outdoor Signs on Rural Roads

markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 394. Regul. of Outdoor Signs on Rural Roads
##### § 394.005 — Disposition of Fees

Money the commission receives under this chapter shall be deposited to the credit of the state highway fund.

*Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1345 (S.B.1420), Sec. 46, eff. September 1, 2011.*

subsections.text: Money the commission receives under this chapter shall be deposited to the credit of the state highway fund.
